kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Between Godfrey and Kingsford, one goes with 5 coins and the other with 8 coins.
Cedric goes with at least one of Cooper, Highrow, or Kingsford.
The artisan in Riverside's levy is lower than both Edmund and the Blacksmith.
4 coins goes with none of Blacksmith, Carpenter, or Riverside.
Beatrix goes with exactly one of Potter, Eastcheap, or Highrow.
Edmund, Highrow, and Kingsford go with Blacksmith, Carpenter, and Cooper, in some order.
Beatrix goes with at most one of Potter, Bridgegate, and 8 coins.
More members of the Clothiers' Guild are in the North Side than members of the Joiners' Guild.
Eastcheap goes with exactly two of Edmund, Carpenter, and 5 coins.
Exactly one of these is true: Wulfric goes with 6 coins; Carpenter goes with 5 coins; Potter goes with Eastcheap.
Everyone in the Joiners' Guild ranks higher in levy than everyone in the Clothiers' Guild.
Either Cedric goes with Bridgegate, or Highrow goes with 5 coins — but not both.
